race.comment: WOWZINO (2) was out of the money but in city grade last time at Doomben and does go well this venue. Won't find this assignment as tough and will prove very hard to stop. SCOTTISH PEARL (8) turned in a decent effort last start to finish third over 2200m at Scone. Has her share of talent and is hard to toss in this suitable race. CLASSIC DEEL (5) last start finished sixth at Hawkesbury over 1800m. Likely improver who should be competitive from the low draw. LONESOME SOUL (7) is worth keeping safe having recorded back-to-back minor placings, the latest when third over 2180m at Ipswich. Each-way chance.
